recommendations.title: Grease
recommendations.overview: Australian good girl Sandy and greaser Danny fell in love over the summer. But when they unexpectedly discover they're now in the same high school, will they be able to rekindle their romance despite their eccentric friends?

recommendations.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble

recommendations.title: The Blue Lagoon

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Love Wrecked

recommendations.title: Sex Doll
recommendations.overview: Set in London's world of high class call girls, Amoureux Solitaires tells the story of London based French escort Virginie, and Rupert, a man who rescues trafficked girls.
